vocab.example: 他的汉语达到了很高的程度。
他们两个人的看法有点矛盾。
爸爸表情严肃地看着我。
根据天气预报，明天会下雨。
我在路上遇到了一个老同学。
看到这个好笑的场面，我不禁笑出声来。
我怀疑这个消息是假的。
杯子掉在地上变成了碎片。
早晨的空气很清新，适合深呼吸。
他总是故意避开那个话题。
他的无礼行为让人感到非常愤怒。
见到老师要主动打招呼。
我们要珍惜每一分一秒。

sentences.text: 他吓得脸青唇白，惊恐万状。
当我看到这一幕，顿时大惊失色。
sentences.description: Turning pale with fright upon seeing something.

sentences.text: 我的脸红得像一个熟透了的红苹果。
sentences.description: Blushing deeply like a ripe red apple.

sentences.text: 拿到试卷，我拖着沉重的脚步走路回家。
sentences.description: Walking home with heavy steps after getting exam results.

sentences.text: 妈妈见我这么懂事，乐得眉开眼笑，开心地竖起大拇指。
sentences.description: Mother beaming with joy and giving a thumbs up.

程度.zh: 损坏的程度比我们想象的要严重。
程度.en: The extent of damage was more serious than we imagined.

程度.zh: 他的汉语表达达到了很高的程度。
程度.en: His Chinese expression reached a very high level.

程度.zh: 每个人受影响的程度都不尽相同。
程度.en: The degree to which each person is affected varies.

程度.zh: 经过练习，他的熟练程度大有提高。
程度.en: After practice, his degree of proficiency improved greatly.

程度.zh: 事情发展到了不可收拾的程度。
程度.en: The matter progressed to an uncontrollable degree.

矛盾.zh: 他们俩因为一点小事产生了矛盾。
矛盾.en: The two of them developed a conflict over a minor matter.

矛盾.zh: 他的言行前后矛盾，让人无法相信。
矛盾.en: His words and deeds were contradictory, leaving people unable to believe him.

矛盾.zh: 化解同学之间的矛盾需要沟通。
矛盾.en: Resolving conflicts between classmates requires communication.

矛盾.zh: 我心里感到非常矛盾，不知该选哪个。
矛盾.en: I feel very conflicted in my heart, not knowing which to choose.

矛盾.zh: 及时解决矛盾可以避免进一步的争吵。
矛盾.en: Resolving contradictions promptly can avoid further quarrels.

严肃.zh: 老师严肃地指出了他在作业中的错误。
严肃.en: The teacher solemnly pointed out errors in his homework.

严肃.zh: 这是一个非常严肃的问题，需要重视。
严肃.en: This is a very serious issue that needs attention.

严肃.zh: 爸爸脸色严肃地坐在那里不说话。
严肃.en: Dad sat there with a serious face without speaking.

严肃.zh: 会议室里弥漫着严谨而严肃的气氛。
严肃.en: A rigorous and serious atmosphere filled the meeting room.

严肃.zh: 请对待这项工作保持严肃认真的态度。
严肃.en: Please maintain a serious and earnest attitude toward this work.

逗.zh: 哥哥故意做滑稽的动作逗妹妹笑。
逗.en: Elder brother intentionally made funny gestures to tease little sister into laughing.

逗.zh: 这只小狗的表现非常逗人喜爱。
逗.en: This little dog's behavior is very amusing and lovable.

逗.zh: 他讲的笑话把全班同学都逗笑了。
逗.en: The joke he told amused the entire class to laughter.

逗.zh: 别去逗那只凶猛的野猫。
逗.en: Don't tease that fierce stray cat.

逗.zh: 小丑的幽默表演非常逗。
逗.en: The clown's humorous performance was very amusing.

根据.zh: 根据天气预报，明天可能会下雨。
根据.en: According to the weather forecast, it might rain tomorrow.

根据.zh: 说话做事都要讲求事实根据。
根据.en: Speaking and doing things must rely on factual basis.

根据.zh: 请根据要求填写表格里的信息。
根据.en: Please fill in the information in the form according to requirements.

根据.zh: 警方根据线索抓获了嫌疑人。
根据.en: The police caught the suspect based on clues.

根据.zh: 根据经验，这样做效果最好。
根据.en: Based on experience, doing this produces the best effect.

遇到.zh: 路上遇到困难时要学会寻求帮助。
遇到.en: Learn to seek help when encountering difficulties on the road.

遇到.zh: 我在超市里偶遇到了很久没见的同学。
遇到.en: I bumped into a classmate I hadn't seen for a long time at the supermarket.

遇到.zh: 无论遇到什么挫折，都不要放弃。
遇到.en: No matter what setbacks you encounter, do not give up.

遇到.zh: 我们在爬山途中遇到了大雾天气。
遇到.en: We encountered heavy fog during our mountain climb.

遇到.zh: 遇到不懂的字词可以翻查字典。
遇到.en: When encountering unfamiliar words, you can look them up in a dictionary.

不禁.zh: 听到这个好消息，他不禁欢呼起来。
不禁.en: Hearing this good news, he couldn't help cheering.

不禁.zh: 看到小丑的精彩表演，大家不禁哈哈大笑。
不禁.en: Seeing the clown's wonderful performance, everyone couldn't help laughing out loud.

不禁.zh: 看着旧照片，我不禁想起了童年的趣事。
不禁.en: Looking at old photos, I couldn't help remembering fun childhood memories.

不禁.zh: 面对如此美景，游人不禁流连忘返。
不禁.en: Facing such beautiful scenery, tourists cannot help being enchanted.

不禁.zh: 想到伤心处，她的眼泪不禁流了下来。
不禁.en: Thinking of sad moments, her tears couldn't help falling.

怀疑.zh: 我怀疑这个实验结果不够准确。
怀疑.en: I suspect this experiment's result is not accurate enough.

怀疑.zh: 没有证据前，不能随意怀疑别人。
怀疑.en: Before having evidence, one shouldn't casually suspect others.

怀疑.zh: 面对大家的怀疑，他拿出了确凿的证据。
怀疑.en: Facing everyone's suspicion, he produced solid evidence.

怀疑.zh: 他的奇怪行为引起了警察的怀疑。
怀疑.en: His strange behavior aroused police suspicion.

怀疑.zh: 不要怀疑自己的能力，你可以做到的。
怀疑.en: Don't doubt your own ability; you can do it.

测试.zh: 老师明天要对我们的英语听力进行测试。
测试.en: The teacher will conduct a test on our English listening tomorrow.

测试.zh: 这款新软件正在接受最终测试。
测试.en: This new software is currently undergoing final testing.

测试.zh: 经过多次测试，机器运转正常。
测试.en: After multiple tests, the machine runs normally.

测试.zh: 心理测试可以帮助人们了解自己。
测试.en: Psychological tests can help people understand themselves.

测试.zh: 汽车上市前需要通过安全测试。
测试.en: Cars need to pass safety tests before hitting the market.

碎片.zh: 打碎的玻璃碎片掉了一地，要注意安全。
碎片.en: Broken glass fragments littered the floor; pay attention to safety.

碎片.zh: 他把废纸撕成碎片扔进了垃圾桶。
碎片.en: He tore waste paper into fragments and threw them into the bin.

碎片.zh: 考古学家发现了古代陶器的碎片。
碎片.en: Archaeologists discovered fragments of ancient pottery.

碎片.zh: 我们利用碎片的休息时间来背单词。
碎片.en: We utilize fragmented break time to memorize words.

碎片.zh: 记忆里只剩下一些零碎的记忆碎片。
碎片.en: Only some scattered memory fragments remain in memory.

呼吸.zh: 清晨到树林里呼吸新鲜空气很舒服。
呼吸.en: Breathing fresh air in the woods in early morning is very comfortable.

呼吸.zh: 运动后，他的呼吸变得十分急促。
呼吸.en: After exercising, his breathing became very rapid.

呼吸.zh: 保持平稳的呼吸有助于放松情绪。
呼吸.en: Maintaining steady breathing helps relax emotions.

呼吸.zh: 鱼类是用鳃在水里进行呼吸的。
呼吸.en: Fish use gills to breathe underwater.

呼吸.zh: 医生正在检查患者的呼吸状况。
呼吸.en: The doctor is checking the patient's breathing condition.

避开.zh: 司机灵活地避开了马路上的障碍物。
避开.en: The driver deftly avoided obstacles on the road.

避开.zh: 出行时我们要尽量避开交通高峰期。
避开.en: We should try our best to avoid peak traffic periods when traveling.

避开.zh: 他故意避开了这个敏感的话题。
避开.en: He intentionally avoided this sensitive topic.

避开.zh: 为了避免碰撞，行人纷纷避开走。
避开.en: To prevent collisions, pedestrians avoided collision by stepping aside.

避开.zh: 船长及时操控轮船避开了冰山。
避开.en: The captain operated the vessel in time to avoid the iceberg.

愤怒.zh: 面对不公正的待遇，他感到非常愤怒。
愤怒.en: Facing unfair treatment, he felt extremely angry.

愤怒.zh: 愤怒的群众向破坏公物的人提出了抗议。
愤怒.en: Angry crowds raised protests against those damaging public property.

愤怒.zh: 强压下心中的愤怒，他努力保持冷静。
愤怒.en: Suppressing inner anger, he strove to remain calm.

愤怒.zh: 他的眼中闪烁着愤怒的光芒。
愤怒.en: His eyes flashed with rays of anger.

愤怒.zh: 冲动时做出的决定往往源于愤怒。
愤怒.en: Decisions made on impulse often stem from anger.

火辣.zh: 晒了整天，皮肤感到一阵火辣的疼痛。
火辣.en: Sunbaked all day, the skin felt a burning hot pain.

火辣.zh: 这道四川菜吃起来火辣十足，非常过瘾。
火辣.en: This Sichuan dish tastes intensely spicy, extremely satisfying.

火辣.zh: 夏天火辣的阳光照耀着大地。
火辣.en: Summer's scorching sunlight shines over the earth.

火辣.zh: 听了批评，他的脸火辣辣地烫了起来。
火辣.en: Hearing the critique, his face felt burning hot.

火辣.zh: 这种辣椒辣味火辣，少放一点。
火辣.en: This chili's spiciness is burning hot, so add less.

打招呼.zh: 早上在路上遇到老师要主动打招呼。
打招呼.en: When meeting teachers on the road in the morning, take initiative to greet them.

打招呼.zh: 他微笑着向每一个路过的人打招呼。
打招呼.en: He smiled and greeted every passerby.

打招呼.zh: 离开前别忘了向主人打招呼道别。
打招呼.en: Don't forget to greet and bid farewell to the host before leaving.

打招呼.zh: 邻居之间见面互相打招呼是一种礼貌。
打招呼.en: Neighbors greeting each other when meeting is a form of politeness.

打招呼.zh: 哥哥挥了挥手向远处的同学打招呼。
打招呼.en: Elder brother waved his hand to greet classmates in the distance.

一分一秒.zh: 时间一分一秒地过去了，大家都很紧张。
一分一秒.en: Time passed minute by minute and second by second; everyone was tense.

一分一秒.zh: 考试时我们要珍惜一分一秒的时间。
一分一秒.en: During exams, we must cherish every single minute and second.

一分一秒.zh: 医生正在争分夺秒，抢救一分一秒。
一分一秒.en: Doctors are racing against time, seizing every minute and second.

一分一秒.zh: 看着墙上的时钟一分一秒地走动。
一分一秒.en: Watching the clock on the wall tick away minute by minute, second by second.

一分一秒.zh: 珍惜一分一秒，才能积累知识。
一分一秒.en: Cherishing every minute and second enables accumulation of knowledge.

抱怨.zh: 遇到困难时不要只会抱怨，要想办法解决。
抱怨.en: Don't just complain when facing difficulties; think of ways to solve them.

抱怨.zh: 他总是抱怨天气太热或者太冷。
抱怨.en: He always complains that weather is either too hot or too cold.

抱怨.zh: 抱怨不能改善现状，行动才能带来改变。
抱怨.en: Complaining cannot improve current status; action brings change.

抱怨.zh: 听到大家的抱怨，负责人改进了工作。
抱怨.en: Hearing everyone's complaints, the person in charge improved operations.

抱怨.zh: 妹妹抱怨作业太多，写不完。
抱怨.en: Younger sister complained homework was too much to finish writing.

闯祸.zh: 弟弟调皮打破了花瓶，知道自己闯祸了。
闯祸.en: Little brother mischievously broke the vase, knowing he caused trouble.

闯祸.zh: 做事要小心谨慎，千万不要闯祸。
闯祸.en: Be careful and cautious when doing things; never get into trouble.

闯祸.zh: 小狗把客厅弄得一团糟，闯了大祸。
闯祸.en: The puppy made a mess of the living room, causing big trouble.

闯祸.zh: 闯祸后要勇于承担责任，不能逃避。
闯祸.en: Stand up and take responsibility after getting into trouble; don't escape.

闯祸.zh: 他总是因为冲动而在外面闯祸。
闯祸.en: He always gets into trouble outside due to impetuousness.
